scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports testing-policy summaries for this school. If official score distributions were not captured, the panel stays policy-only rather than inventing ranges.
policy: Duke is test-optional for first-year and transfer applicants in the 2026-2027 admissions cycle.

claims.claim: Duke is test-optional for first-year and transfer applicants in the 2026-2027 admissions cycle.
